solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: The tests check for the method name `log_eval_samples` (which is specified in the instruction as a requirement), check behavioral properties (delegation, table row addition, skipping empty completions), and use AST extraction to test methods in isolation. Alternative implementations that use the same method name but different internal logic (e.g., different variable names, different iteration patterns) would pass.
